nasb.text: This is the plan devised against the whole earth; and this is the hand that is stretched out against all the nations.

esv.text: This is the purpose that is purposed concerning the whole earth, and this is the hand that is stretched out over all the nations.

cnv.text: 這就是對全地所定的旨意， 就是向列國伸出的手。

ccb.text: 这是我对全世界所定的计划， 是向列国伸出的惩罚之手。”

csbs.text: 这就是对全地所策划的谋略， 这就是向万国所伸出的手。
